skills.name: Bad Guy
skills.effect_text:
Desperado Skill Damage + CaptionRatio %
When Desperado skill is Critical, decreases by CaptionRatio2 second(s) up to CaptionRatio3 second(s)

skills.name: Equilibrium
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per strike SkillFactor %
Number of targets CaptionRatio
Violent Consumed per skill cast CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Revenged
skills.description: Quickly move to the flank or rear of the closest enemy and launch a brute force attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 6
Number of targets CaptionRatio
Violent Consumed CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Deadly Fire
skills.description: Slash diagonally in front of you to Seal(Immobilize) enemies for 1 second and quickly draw your revolver to fire a special penetrating bullet.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 6
Number of targets CaptionRatio
Violent Consumed CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Russian Roulette
skills.description: Test your luck with a game of death.
skills.effect_text: Basic skill factor of target + CaptionRatio % when consuming Violent

skills.name: Last Man Standing
skills.description: Pronounce the Death Sentence on up to 6 enemies. Instantly fires a 6 special Penetrating Special Bullet to each target.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per bullet SkillFactor %
Number of penetrated targets per bullet CaptionRatio
Violent Consumed CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Equilibrium: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Equilibrium] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Revenged: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Revenged] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Deadly Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Deadly Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Russian Roulette: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Russian Roulette]'s enhance effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Last Man Standing: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Last Man Standing] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Equilibrium: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the enhance effect of [Equilibrium] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Revenged: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Revenged] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Deadly Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Deadly Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Russian Roulette: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the enhance effect of [Russian Roulette] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Last Man Standing: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Last Man Standing] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Bad Guy: Death Approaching
attributes.description:
* Desperado Final Damage increases by 3% when Desperado skill is accurately hit (Up to 5 stacks)

* 5 stacks applied when Last Man Standing is cast

attributes.name: [Arts] Russian Roulette: Death Awaiting
attributes.description:
* Cooldown caused by [Russian Roulette] UNLUCKY changed 10 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 200%

attributes.name: Revenged: Death Trajectory
attributes.description:
* Skill factor of the Revenged cast within 3 seconds after [Equilibrium] Retreat Shot increases by (4 x [Equilibrium] level)%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

* Can only be changed in towns.

attributes.name: Deadly Fire: Death Gravity
attributes.description:
* Skill factor of the Deadly Fire cast within 3 seconds after [Equilibrium] charging charging increases by (5 x [Equilibrium] level)%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

* Can only be changed in towns.

attributes.name: Russian Roulette: Death Impulse
attributes.description:
* [Russian Roulette] UNLUCKY chance doubles, but the increase rate of Violent factor doubles

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

* Any existing Violent buff will be removed

attributes.name: [Arts] Last Man Standing: Death Sentence
attributes.description:
* The target penetration attack of [Last Man Standing] is changed to non-penetrable skill but the number of hit doubles per bullet

* Increases SP consumption by 50%
